item.name: Cieldalaes Geode
item.description:
The true beauty of this wavekin is on the inside, whereas on the outside, it looks like a coblyn in a bad mood.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: In contrast to its dull, rubble-like exterior, the inside of this wavekin's maw rivals the rainbow beauty of a crystal prism. Those braving a closer look should also be prepared to admire its razor-sharp teeth.
